data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the sequence builder.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the sequence builder functionality (day 0, day 3, day 7, etc.), but the provided evidence does not include any specific details or examples demonstrating that this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for a sequence builder, but there is no concrete evidence showing that this functionality has been implemented or tested. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of the sequence builder functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the sequence builder functionality.
